About Me

Passionate coder, structural thinker, and technology enthusiast

Who is Syed Afrid?

I am a Full-Stack Web Developer with hands-on experience building end-to-end web architectures and AI-assisted workflows. Holding a Master of Computer Applications (MCA) degree, I combine strong theoretical knowledge of data structures and databases with practical, modern web development skills. My coding philosophy revolves around performance optimization, clean architectures, and responsive UI/UX designs.

Professional Journey

Internships and industry experience in development environments

Dec 2025 – Mar 2026

Full Stack Web Development Intern

SFO Technologies Pvt Ltd

Engineered "Meeting Suite," an end-to-end web application integrating frontend interfaces, backend servers, and secure databases. Gained extensive, hands-on experience in Microsoft Dynamics 365 F&O and enterprise resource planning (ERP) processes, which resulted in a 30% improvement in operational workflow efficiency.

Mar 2025 – Apr 2025

Full Stack Web Development Intern

Prodigy Infotech

Created responsive web interfaces using HTML5, CSS3, and JavaScript. Collaborated on full-stack application modules, contributing to modular, scalable, and highly maintainable systems architecture while focusing heavily on page optimization and code execution efficiency.

Featured Projects

A selection of web platforms and systems built from scratch

React.js Node.js Supabase OAuth 2.0

MEASI LMS

Engineered a high-performance e-learning platform (LMS) designed for MEASI Institute. Built on a modular React and TypeScript architecture, it features secure JWT/OAuth 2.0 authentication systems, Supabase data integrations, and an automated grading framework, improving student engagement by 40%.

Explore
HTML5/CSS3 AI Integration WhatsApp API

VCAN3D Website

Built a multi-page static website integrated with AI-driven components and an automated WhatsApp client liaison. Fully optimized user interface responsiveness, navigation transitions, and page layouts, yielding a major boost in lead generation and customer engagement.

Explore
Three.js GSAP HTML5/CSS/JS

Portfolio Website

Designed and coded a fully responsive and interactive personal portfolio using core web standards. Integrating particle shaders in Three.js and complex timelines in GSAP, this site showcases a unified resume, projects, and contact hubs in a highly cinematic framework.
